_comment: The procedure is identified by HBP 2.0 code SS011A, with HBP 1.0 code S1400018 also provided in the source document.

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes contain detailed history, signs & symptoms, and indication for procedure?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and line of treatment?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advice at the time of discharge?

common_queries: Clinical notes are incomplete, lacking detailed history, signs & symptoms, or explicit indication for surgery.
CT/Fistulography/Barium study report is missing or does not confirm the diagnosis of fistula.
Indoor case papers (ICPs) are missing or do not include daily vitals and line of treatment.
Detailed procedure / operative notes are missing or incomplete.
Discharge summary is missing or does not include follow-up advice.

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed with Fecal fistula only if diagnosis is backed by clinical manifestation of fecal discharge from surgical wound site.

Common causes include Trauma, Inflammatory bowel disease, Operations of malignancy, post-operative complication (large or small bowel), appendicitis, diverticulitis, radiation, tuberculosis, and ischemia.
additional_information.pre_op_preparation: Initial resuscitation and electrolyte repletion, antibiotic management, nutrition, wound care, and fistula effluent control are required prior to definitive operative treatment.
